text.title: Go Standard Layout — Toolchain Reference Decision Tree
text.summary: Two-question gate: preconditions present? duplicate artefact exists? Routes to run / update / skip. Every conclusion references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (prerequisite artefacts present AND named owner identifiable AND artefact store writable)

branch.question: Does an existing working artefact already cover this gap?

branch.conclusion: Skip: do not duplicate. Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
Run the procedure. Emit a new artefact per the output contract.
Skip this methodology. Surface the missing precondition. Defer until the gap is closed.

text.example: inputs: {owner=alex@acme.com, prerequisites_present=true, existing_artefact=false} q-preconditions -> true q-duplicate -> false => conclusion run-the-checklist: emit new artefact.
